name: core-hooks
description: Cross-stack safety + docs-sync + subagent-brief + verify-changes — PreToolUse hooks that block edits to secrets and dangerous shell commands, a docs-sync skill that catches drift at end-of-task, a subagent-brief skill that enforces warm-brief discipline on delegation, and a verify-changes skill that runs generic cross-stack verification with dependency graph + batched execution so large changesets get checked without losing context. Pure prompt — no hooks, no MCPs, no indexing. Works on any stack with Read / Grep / Glob / Edit / TaskCreate alone.
